name: kotikit
description: Designer-first Figma flow kit for creating, improving, and reviewing UI with local design-system grounding.

interface.shortDescription: Create and review Figma drafts with local design-system context.
interface.longDescription: Kotikit helps UX/UI designers create high-fidelity Figma drafts, improve existing designs, review comments, and sync local design-system context through one shared MCP server.
